title: # |[ CHARACTER_W4V3_MODEL.v1.0 ]|
content:
# |[ CHARACTER_W4V3_MODEL.v1.0 ]|

Each character = waveform object
Used for fusion, modulation, triggering, narrative encoding

CHARACTER_W4V3 {
SIGN4TUR3_ID: "J3SS-04"
W4V3_FORM: sine | square | noise | pulse | fractal | soulwave
MOD_AMP: float [-1.0, +1.0]
FREQ_B4SE: Hz or META_CYCLE (e.g. BPM, narrative beat, moon)
FUSI0N_COMPAT: ["Aphex Twin", "Gabe", "MM15"]
MYTHIC_TAGS: ["GOD", "ANGEL", "ERROR"]
EMIT_EFFECTS: function() → modifies system threads
ALIGNED_EVENTS: ["sunset", "April 18", "full_moon"]
}
